content.hint: 表达你将主动提供具体的修改安排，而不是简单承诺完成
content.situation: 学生向教授请求延长论文提交期限，并主动提出提交修改计划以争取批准
content.speakerText: I understand you're under pressure, but I need to see a clear revision plan before I can approve an extension.
content.speakerTextCn: 我理解你压力很大，但在批准延期前，我需要看到一个清晰的修改计划。
content.knowledgePoint: 提出具体执行方案以提高请求成功率
content.responseTemplate: I appreciate your flexibility. I'll ___ and send it to you by the end of the week.

content.hint: 表达请求时常用 'would like to do' 结构
content.template: I'd like ___ submit a revised version with a clear timeline.
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（预约/请求场景核心句型）
